title: Analytics
headline: Focus reflection
description: Patterns from recent sessions, softened into signals you can act on.

errors.load: Analytics could not refresh. Existing charts will reappear once the connection recovers.

empty.title: Complete a few sessions to reveal patterns
empty.description: Focus trends, heatmaps, and distraction sources become useful after several completed sessions.
empty.weekly: No weekly snapshot is available yet.
empty.trend: Complete more sessions to see the trend line.

charts.peakHoursDescription: Higher opacity means stronger average focus. Each cell includes a text tooltip.

weekly.title: Weekly progress
weekly.description: This week compared with last week

recommendations.best_duration_bucket: Use the session length that has produced your strongest average focus score.
recommendations.no_clear_mode_preference: Keep both normal and Deep Work modes available until the data shows a clearer pattern.
recommendations.deep_work_outperforms_normal: Deep Work is currently performing better for you. Prefer it for the next focused session.
recommendations.normal_outperforms_deep_work: Normal mode is currently performing better. Use it when you want a steadier session.
recommendations.recommended_break_after_session: Add a short break after the next session so the next block starts cleaner.
recommendations.best_focus_time: Plan the next important session inside your strongest focus time window.
recommendations.high_warning_domain: Review the main distracting domain before your next session.
recommendations.high_tab_switch_frequency: Reduce tab switching before starting the next block.
recommendations.warnings_in_last_third: Shorten the next session slightly or add a break before the final third.
recommendations.no_previous_week_baseline: Keep this week as the baseline; comparisons will become clearer after another week.
recommendations.focus_time_increased: Your total focus time increased this week. Keep the current rhythm.
recommendations.focus_time_decreased: Your total focus time decreased this week. Start with a smaller next session.
recommendations.focus_score_improved: Your average focus score improved this week. Repeat the conditions that helped.
recommendations.focus_score_declined: Your average focus score declined this week. Review distractions before the next session.
recommendations.warnings_reduced: Distraction warnings decreased this week. Keep the same setup.
recommendations.warnings_increased: Distraction warnings increased this week. Clean up the main distraction source first.
recommendations.insufficient_weekly_data: There is not enough weekly history yet. Complete a few more sessions to sharpen the signal.

export.title: Export focus report
export.description: Export the current {{range}} analytics range. JSON and HTML are returned immediately when ready; PDF may be generated as a background job.
export.queued: Report export has been queued. Use Check status to refresh the job.
export.expired: This export has expired. Create a new export to download it again.
